title: Gamemode Detector
description: This notifies you when people switch their gamemode!
body:
Have you ever joined a SMP and wondered if the owner is switching in/out of creative mode?
Introducing **Gamemode Detector** This is a client mode having one purpose: to notify you when other people switch their gamemode. Pretty simple, right? If you are ever scared that the mod will spam you every time you join a big server (cuz of the NPCs), starting from v1.1, you can directly disable/enable the mod in game using [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) If you have any suggestion, you can create an issue or pull a request on my [github repo](https://github.com/Withicality/GamemodeDetector) and I'll hopefully implement them. Have fun!
